sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64789" key="malakoptuxh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰλᾰκο-πτῠχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, dub. sens., <sense id="n64789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄρτοι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.36</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
